name: chr21_21q22_DSCAM_region_SD
description: 21q22.2 region surrounding DSCAM (Down Syndrome Cell Adhesion Molecule); part of the Down Syndrome Critical Region (DSCR). DSCAM itself spans ~840 kb with extensive intronic SDs and is flanked by short SD blocks; dosage in trisomy 21 implicated in congenital heart defects.

architecture.internal_structure: Intronic SDs within DSCAM and short flanking duplicons at >95% identity; partial DSCAM paralog DSCAML1 on chr11.

related_diseases: Down syndrome congenital heart disease (DSCAM dosage)
